title: SV: $sformatf format specifier incorrect - additional check needed

features.name: sformatf with class handle argument
features.description: Code should include a $sformatf call with a class handle or null as an argument using the %0h format specifier

features.name: macro containing sformatf with mixed type arguments
features.description: Code should include a macro definition that expands to $sformatf with both integer and class handle arguments
features.snippet:
`define DV_CHECK_NE(ACT_, EXP_) \
    $sformatf("Check failed 0x%0h vs 0x%0h", ACT_, EXP_)

features.name: class with null handle comparison in sformatf
features.description: Code should include a class handle set to null being used as an argument in $sformatf format string
